entries.title: Datasette Agent
entries.summary: We just announced the first release of Datasette Agent , a new extensible AI assistant for Datasette. I've been working on my LLM Python library for just over three years now, and Datasette Agent represents the moment that LLM and Datasette finally come together. I'm really excited about it! RT Harsh Jaiswal: Re After configuring CAS on my instance, and trust me, this was the toughest part of the journey. Once done, Claude forged a JWT, PO...
entries.summary: RT Harsh Jaiswal Re After configuring CAS on my instance, and trust me, this was the toughest part of the journey. Once done, Claude forged a JWT, POSTs it to /SAML20/SP/ACS, and gets a session cookie/tokens which can be used to connect to the VPN. It was game over. Your private network was public. If you're running CAS-enabled PAN-OS, update the appliance immediately.
